# theuaecareer.com

## About
UAE job information portal with verified job listings, career guides, salary insights, and free tools for Gulf job seekers in UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://theuaecareer.com/
- Jobs: https://theuaecareer.com/jobs/
- Walk-In Interviews: https://theuaecareer.com/jobs/walk-in/
- Blog: https://theuaecareer.com/blog/
- Resources: https://theuaecareer.com/resources/
- Interview Question Bank: https://theuaecareer.com/resources/interview-question-bank/
- CV Maker: https://theuaecareer.com/tools/cv-maker/
- Gratuity Calculator: https://theuaecareer.com/tools/gratuity-calculator/
- Currency Converter: https://theuaecareer.com/tools/currency-converter/
- About: https://theuaecareer.com/about/

## Content Categories
- Career Guides (job search strategies, application tips, interview preparation)
- Salary Insights (AED salary data, cost of living, remittance corridors)
- Visa & PRO Guides (UAE visa types, work permit process, PRO services)
- Interview Preparation (common questions, dress code, etiquette)
- Job Safety & Scam Prevention (how to verify employers, red flags)
- Walk-In Interviews (scheduled walk-in events across UAE, Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi)

## Data Coverage
- Job listings: UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah), Saudi Arabia, Qatar
- Salary data sourced from real candidate reports (Oct 2025–present)
- Articles written for Gulf expatriate job seekers

## Sitemap
https://theuaecareer.com/sitemap.xml
